units.content: SHAP produces per-instance attributions over model outputs
Claim 8a sensitivity sets are hand-authored property-to-attribute dictionaries consumed upstream by the comparator
SHAP operates on outputs post-hoc; claim 8a sensitivity sets operate on architectural attributes pre-execution
Lundberg & Lee is distinguished from claim 8a because SHAP is a per-instance output attribution method, not a pre-registered architectural divergence predictor
